voxya.description: Shadow, death, void — the Shattered Archipelago

orilyth.description: Energy, crystal, data — the Veil of Whispers

korvess.description: Mutation, flora, evolution — the Verdant Abyss

sanguis.description: Magma, spirit, defense — the Crimson Veil

silith9.description: Machine, cybernetic, cold precision — the False Moon

creatures.name: Voidmire Stalker
creatures.flavor: It does not chase. It simply appears where you are weakest.

creatures.name: Throne Wraith
creatures.flavor: A silent crown for a kingdom of ash.

creatures.name: Gloomforge Thrall
creatures.flavor: Forged in silence. Built to endure.

creatures.name: Dusk Gate Lurker
creatures.flavor: It waits where the light forgets to go.

creatures.name: Skyrift Harvester
creatures.effect: When this destroys an enemy creature, steal 4 Essence.

creatures.name: Weeping Stone Revenant
creatures.effect: Once per game, when destroyed, return to your hand instead.

creatures.name: Stormspire Shade
creatures.effect: Gains +500 ATK while attacking along a purple ley-line.

creatures.name: Merchant's Grave Specter
creatures.effect: On summon, discard 1 card to draw 2 new ones.

creatures.name: Shadow Throne Tyrant
creatures.effect: Whenever it destroys a creature, gain 5 Essence. King's Aura: All your Level 1 creatures gain +300 ATK.

creatures.name: Archipelago Leviathan
creatures.effect: Can move through one occupied hex. Once per game: Teleport to any hex adjacent to a friendly base.

creatures.name: Eternal Dusk Sovereign
creatures.effect: At the start of every minute, deal 800 damage to the nearest enemy King's Throne.

creatures.name: Spark Drone
creatures.flavor: A humming shard of bottled lightning, eager to discharge.

creatures.name: Crystal Sentry
creatures.flavor: Faceted eyes see every whisper carried on the storm.

creatures.name: Stormcaller Adept
creatures.flavor: The youngest adepts can redirect a storm with a whisper.

creatures.name: Data Wraith
creatures.flavor: It lives inside the message, feeding on its meaning.

creatures.name: Lightning Weaver
creatures.effect: Deals 400 splash damage to all enemy creatures at the same base on arrival.
creatures.flavor: Her loom is the sky; her thread is lightning.

creatures.name: Crystal Spire Warden
creatures.effect: This creature cannot be moved by enemy effects.
creatures.flavor: The spire has stood for a thousand years. It will stand for a thousand more.

creatures.name: Cipher Knight
creatures.effect: Gains +400 ATK when attacking a Silith-9 creature.
creatures.flavor: Every blow is a decryption key against the False Moon.

creatures.name: Storm Leviathan
creatures.effect: On summon: deal 600 damage to all enemy creatures within 1 hop.
creatures.flavor: The oldest storm in the Veil, given form and purpose.

creatures.name: Data Sovereign
creatures.effect: Reveal one random enemy creature's stats at the start of each minute.
creatures.flavor: Knowledge is the only currency that cannot be stolen.

creatures.name: Thornling Swarm
creatures.flavor: A thousand tiny mouths, all screaming for flesh.

creatures.name: Rotbark Sentinel
creatures.flavor: It has stood watch since before the Fracture. It remembers.

creatures.name: Vinespeaker
creatures.flavor: She sings to the roots, and the roots obey.

creatures.name: Chitin Brute
creatures.flavor: Each generation sheds a stronger shell.

creatures.name: Spore Horror
creatures.effect: When destroyed, deal 500 damage to the creature that destroyed it.
creatures.flavor: Its death is just another stage in its life cycle.

creatures.name: Carnivorous Cradle
creatures.effect: Enemy creatures that move into this base take 300 damage.
creatures.flavor: It blooms only when prey steps inside.

creatures.name: Alpha Predator
creatures.effect: Gains +300 ATK for each enemy creature at the same base.
creatures.flavor: The jungle crowned it. The jungle is never wrong.

creatures.name: Verdant Titan
creatures.effect: Heals 400 HP to your King's Throne at the start of each minute.
creatures.flavor: The forest itself rose to defend its children.

creatures.name: Hive Mind Sovereign
creatures.effect: All your creatures at the same base share their highest ATK value.
creatures.flavor: What one knows, all know. What one strikes, all kill.

creatures.name: Cinder Hound
creatures.flavor: Its footsteps leave smoldering prints in solid rock.

creatures.name: Magma Guardian
creatures.flavor: Cooled on the outside, burning eternal within.

creatures.name: Ember Seer
creatures.flavor: She reads the future in the dance of dying embers.

creatures.name: Ash Phalanx
creatures.flavor: A thousand warriors, compressed into a single burning form.

creatures.name: Flame Lancer
creatures.effect: Pierces through: ignores 400 DEF when attacking.
creatures.flavor: Her lance was forged in the heart of a dying star.

creatures.name: Crimson Bastion
creatures.effect: All friendly creatures at this base gain +300 DEF.
creatures.flavor: The walls bleed, but they never break.

creatures.name: Pyroclastic Wyrm
creatures.effect: Can move through enemy-occupied bases without engaging.
creatures.flavor: It swims through stone as if it were water.

creatures.name: Magma Sovereign
creatures.effect: At the start of each minute, deal 400 damage to all enemy creatures at adjacent bases.
creatures.flavor: The mountain speaks. All of Sanguis listens.

creatures.name: Phoenix Ascendant
creatures.effect: Once per game, when destroyed: revive at your King's Throne with full stats.
creatures.flavor: Death is merely the fire that makes her brighter.

creatures.name: Chrome Drone
creatures.flavor: It has no fear subroutine.

creatures.name: Grid Sentry
creatures.flavor: It scans. It waits. It never blinks.

creatures.name: Neural Scout
creatures.flavor: Its eyes are the Nine's eyes. You are already observed.

creatures.name: Bioforge Abomination
creatures.flavor: A hundred donor genomes, one perfect killing machine.

creatures.name: Plasma Reaver
creatures.effect: Deals +500 damage to creatures with DEF above 1500.
creatures.flavor: Armor is irrelevant. Plasma does not discriminate.

creatures.name: Phase Wraith
creatures.effect: Can move through one occupied base per turn without engaging.
creatures.flavor: It exists in two hexes until observed.

creatures.name: Chrome Colossus
creatures.effect: Deals double ATK when attacking a King's Throne.
creatures.flavor: The Nine built it to crack worlds.

creatures.name: Nexus Reaper
creatures.effect: When this destroys a creature, summon a Chrome Drone at the same base.
creatures.flavor: Every kill feeds the Nexus. Every death builds the army.

creatures.name: Prime Directive
creatures.effect: All enemy creatures lose 200 ATK while this is on the field.
creatures.flavor: The Nine speak as one. Their voice ends worlds.

spells.name: Void Pulse
spells.effect: Target creature gains +400 ATK until end of the minute.
spells.flavor: A whisper from the void. A moment of terrible clarity.

spells.name: Shadow Veil
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +800 DEF and cannot be targeted by enemy spells for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: The shadows do not hide you. They become you.

spells.name: Essence Drain
spells.effect: Deal 600 damage to target enemy creature and gain 3 Essence.
spells.flavor: What they lose, you consume. Such is the pact.

spells.name: Ley-Line Surge
spells.effect: All your creatures on purple ley-lines gain +500 ATK and +1 Movement for 45 seconds.
spells.flavor: The old lines remember. They hunger for direction.

spells.name: Dusk Binding
spells.effect: Slow target enemy creature (Movement -1) for 60 seconds.
spells.flavor: The weight of the abyss, pressed into a single step.

spells.name: Eclipse Bolt
spells.effect: Deal 1200 damage to target creature. If it's on a ley-line, deal +800 extra.
spells.flavor: When the void aligns, even gods become targets.

spells.name: Whispering Decay
spells.effect: Target enemy creature loses -300 ATK/DEF every 30 seconds (stacks up to 3 times).
spells.flavor: Not a scream. Not a curse. Just a suggestion that grows teeth.

spells.name: Shadow Swap
spells.effect: Swap positions of any two of your creatures on the map.
spells.flavor: One step into darkness. One step out somewhere else.

spells.name: Throne's Hunger
spells.effect: Sacrifice one of your creatures to deal 1500 damage to an enemy base or King structure.
spells.flavor: A seat built on bones. It is never full.

spells.name: Revenant's Call
spells.effect: Return one destroyed Undead Spirit from your graveyard to the field (half stats for 45 seconds).
spells.flavor: The dead owe you no loyalty. Only debt.

spells.name: Void Sacrifice
spells.effect: Destroy one of your creatures to give all friendly Shadow creatures +600 ATK for 60 seconds.
spells.flavor: One life for many. The void is a fair accountant.

spells.name: Eternal Nightfall
spells.effect: For the next 2 minutes: All enemy creatures lose -400 ATK, your creatures gain +200 ATK.
spells.flavor: The sun does not set here. It flees.

spells.name: Chains of Truth
spells.effect: Target enemy creature cannot move, attack, or be targeted by its own allies' spells for 20 seconds.
spells.flavor: You are seen. You are known. You are held.

spells.name: Pulse Scan
spells.effect: Reveal all hidden/invisible enemy creatures within a 2-tile radius of target friendly creature for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: The crystals remember everything. They simply need to be asked.

spells.name: Crystal Lattice
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +600 DEF and reflects 100 damage back to attackers for 45 seconds.
spells.flavor: Strike the lattice and the lattice strikes back.

spells.name: Data Stream
spells.effect: Link two friendly creatures. When one gains ATK or DEF, the other gains half that amount for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: Two minds, one truth. Information shared is power doubled.

spells.name: Overcharge
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +900 ATK for 30 seconds, then loses -300 ATK for the next 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: Every surge has its cost. The lattice does not forget the debt.

spells.name: Echo Chamber
spells.effect: All your creatures within 3 tiles of an Orilyth ley-line gain +200 ATK and +200 DEF. Lasts 60 seconds.
spells.flavor: The whispers of Orilyth amplify into a roar.

spells.name: Prism Guard
spells.effect: All friendly creatures in a 2-tile radius gain a shield absorbing 500 damage. Lasts 45 seconds.
spells.flavor: A thousand facets. A single unbroken light.

spells.name: Foresight
spells.effect: The next enemy spell cast within 60 seconds is negated and its cost is refunded to you as +2 mana.
spells.flavor: They foresaw Earth's doom. Your spell is no surprise.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.effect: Deal 800 damage to target enemy creature, then bounce to the nearest enemy within 2 tiles for 400 damage. Chains up to 3 times.
spells.flavor: The storm only needs one point of contact.

spells.name: Resonance Cascade
spells.effect: All creatures on the field take 300 damage. Orilyth creatures take half damage.
spells.flavor: When the crystals sing in unison, the world trembles.

spells.name: Temporal Shift
spells.effect: For 45 seconds: all your Orilyth creatures gain double movement and halved summon times.
spells.flavor: Time is data. And data can be rewritten.

spells.name: The Great Forecast
spells.effect: For 90 seconds: reveal the entire map, all your creatures gain +300 ATK and +1 Movement, and enemy stealth is disabled.
spells.flavor: The Veil lifts. Every secret, every shadow — seen.

spells.name: Sprout
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +100 ATK and +100 DEF. If on a Korvess ley-line, gains an additional +200 ATK/DEF.
spells.flavor: Even the smallest seed cracks stone.

spells.name: Vine Snare
spells.effect: Target enemy creature is rooted (Movement = 0) for 30 seconds. Deals 100 damage every 10 seconds while rooted.
spells.flavor: The forest does not chase. It simply waits for you to stop moving.

spells.name: Photosynthesis
spells.effect: All friendly creatures on Korvess ley-lines regenerate 200 DEF every 15 seconds. Lasts 60 seconds.
spells.flavor: Light is life. The Abyss provides plenty.

spells.name: Spore Cloud
spells.effect: All enemy creatures within 2 tiles of target point lose -300 ATK and -200 DEF for 45 seconds.
spells.flavor: Breathe deep. The Abyss is already inside you.

spells.name: Mutation Surge
spells.effect: Transform target friendly creature: swap its ATK and DEF, then give +400 to its new DEF for 60 seconds. Also grants a random mutation (regen 100/s or reflect 50 dmg).
spells.flavor: What you were is irrelevant. Only what you become matters.

spells.name: Thorn Barricade
spells.effect: All friendly creatures within 2 tiles of target base gain +700 DEF and thorns (deal 150 damage to attackers) for 45 seconds.
spells.flavor: Every wall in Korvess has teeth.

spells.name: Rapid Evolution
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +200 ATK and +200 DEF every 20 seconds (stacks up to 3 times). If it dies, refund 4 mana.
spells.flavor: Adapt or die. Preferably both, in that order.

spells.name: Carnivorous Bloom
spells.effect: Deal 1000 damage to target enemy creature. If this kills it, summon a Lv.1 Korvess creature at its position for free.
spells.flavor: Death feeds the garden.

spells.name: Overgrowth
spells.effect: For 60 seconds: all ley-lines count as Korvess ley-lines for your creatures, and enemy movement costs +1 on all terrain.
spells.flavor: The Abyss does not ask permission to spread.

spells.name: Regrowth
spells.effect: Revive the most recently destroyed friendly creature at half stats (permanent). Costs +2 extra mana for each time used per match.
spells.flavor: Nothing truly dies in the Abyss. It only changes form.

spells.name: Swarm Spores
spells.effect: Deal 500 damage to all enemy creatures and heal all friendly creatures for 300. Bonus +200 damage/heal per Korvess creature you control.
spells.flavor: One spore is an annoyance. A million is an ecosystem.

spells.name: Genesis
spells.effect: For 90 seconds: all your creatures gain +400 ATK/DEF, regenerate 150/s, and when any friendly creature dies, a Lv.1 Korvess creature spawns at your nearest base.
spells.flavor: Life does not begin. It simply continues.

spells.name: Ember
spells.effect: Deal 300 damage to target enemy creature. If it dies, the nearest friendly creature gains +200 ATK for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: A spark is all the Veil needs.

spells.name: Ancestor's Shield
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +500 DEF and is immune to damage for the next 10 seconds.
spells.flavor: The dead do not forget their blood.

spells.name: Rage
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +600 ATK but loses -300 DEF for 45 seconds.
spells.flavor: Pain is fuel. The Veil burns brightest in fury.

spells.name: Magma Vein
spells.effect: Create a 2-tile radius zone at target location. Enemy creatures inside take 150 damage per 10 seconds. Lasts 60 seconds.
spells.flavor: The ground remembers every slight.

spells.name: Spirit Walk
spells.effect: Target friendly creature becomes untargetable and can move through enemy creatures for 20 seconds. Gains +2 Movement.
spells.flavor: The Veil parts for those who carry the flame.

spells.name: Inferno
spells.effect: Deal 800 damage to all creatures within a 2-tile radius. Sanguis creatures take half damage.
spells.flavor: Fire does not discriminate. The Veil teaches you to endure it.

spells.name: Berserker's Call
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +1000 ATK and attacks the nearest enemy every 15 seconds automatically. Lasts 45 seconds or until death.
spells.flavor: The ancestors demand a tribute of blood.

spells.name: Honorable Sacrifice
spells.effect: Destroy target friendly creature to deal damage equal to its ATK to all enemy creatures within 3 tiles.
spells.flavor: A warrior's death is not an ending. It is a weapon.

spells.name: Volcanic Eruption
spells.effect: Deal 1200 damage to target enemy base or King structure. If it destroys the target, all your creatures gain +400 ATK for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: The Veil does not break. It erupts.

spells.name: Pyre Renewal
spells.effect: Destroy target friendly creature. After 20 seconds, it returns with +50% ATK and full DEF. Usable once per creature per match.
spells.flavor: Through ash, the phoenix remembers its name.

spells.name: Lava Armor
spells.effect: All friendly Sanguis creatures gain +600 DEF and deal 200 fire damage to any enemy that attacks them. Lasts 60 seconds.
spells.flavor: Touch the Veil and the Veil touches back.

spells.name: The Great Forge
spells.effect: For 2 minutes: all creature summon costs are halved, summon times are halved, and newly summoned creatures gain +500 ATK/DEF for their first 60 seconds.
spells.flavor: The forges of Sanguis never cool. Every weapon is still being made.

spells.name: Precision Strike
spells.effect: Deal 400 damage to target enemy creature. Cannot be deflected, reduced, or blocked.
spells.flavor: One shot. One outcome. The math is absolute.

spells.name: Firewall
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +400 DEF and spell immunity for 20 seconds.
spells.flavor: Unauthorized access is not a crime here. It is a miscalculation.

spells.name: Overclock
spells.effect: Target friendly creature gains +500 ATK and +1 Movement for 30 seconds. Afterward, it is disabled (cannot act) for 10 seconds.
spells.flavor: Performance above spec. Stability below tolerance.

spells.name: Hack
spells.effect: Take control of target enemy creature for 15 seconds. It can attack and move. Cannot target King structures or bases.
spells.flavor: Every system has a backdoor. The Nine wrote most of them.

spells.name: Deploy Turret
spells.effect: Place a turret (ATK 600, DEF 400) at target location for 60 seconds. Attacks the nearest enemy every 10 seconds. Max 2 turrets active.
spells.flavor: Area denial is the purest form of negotiation.

spells.name: EMP Pulse
spells.effect: All enemy creatures within 2 tiles of target point are disabled (cannot act, move, or cast) for 15 seconds. Mechanical/synthetic creatures are disabled for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: Silence. The loudest statement the Nine ever make.

spells.name: Orbital Strike
spells.effect: Deal 1000 damage to target location. All creatures within 1 tile take the damage. 20-second delay with visible warning marker.
spells.flavor: The False Moon sees you. Calibration in progress.

spells.name: Efficiency Protocol
spells.effect: For 60 seconds: all Silith-9 creatures' essence costs are reduced by 2 (minimum 1).
spells.flavor: Waste is the enemy. Optimization is worship.

spells.name: Reverse Engineer
spells.effect: Target enemy creature loses all active buffs. You gain +2 mana and a random friendly Silith-9 creature gains +300 ATK/DEF.
spells.flavor: Your magic is just undocumented technology.

spells.name: Nano-Swarm
spells.effect: Release a swarm dealing 200 damage per 10 seconds to the nearest enemy creature. Follows your highest-ATK creature. Lasts 60 seconds.
spells.flavor: A billion tiny reminders that you are not in control.

spells.name: Orbital Relay
spells.effect: For 60 seconds: all your creatures gain +300 ATK, all enemy creatures lose -200 DEF, and Silith-9 creatures gain +1 Movement.
spells.flavor: The satellites align. The math is final.

spells.name: The Singularity
spells.effect: For 90 seconds: all your creatures gain +500 ATK/DEF, your mana regeneration doubles, and enemy spells cost +2 extra mana to cast.
spells.flavor: The Nine have been planning this since before your sun was born.

spells.name: Void Rift
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Deal 700 damage and teleport the creature back to its nearest base.
spells.flavor: Step into the void and the void decides where you land.

spells.name: Soul Cage
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Creature is trapped (cannot move or act) for 30 seconds. Loses 200 ATK/DEF every 10 seconds while trapped.
spells.flavor: Not a prison of bars. A prison of self.

spells.name: Essence Siphon
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Creature loses 400 ATK permanently. You gain 4 mana.
spells.flavor: What was theirs is now yours. The void keeps careful books.

spells.name: Shadow Mire
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Movement reduced to 1. Takes 100 damage per tile it moves for 45 seconds.
spells.flavor: Every step costs. The abyss charges interest.

spells.name: Death Rattle
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Deal 600 damage. If this kills the creature, all enemy creatures within 3 tiles lose -300 ATK for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: One scream. A thousand echoes. Silence.

spells.name: Prism Snare
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Creature is revealed for 60 seconds and stunned for 10 seconds. All your creatures gain +200 ATK against it.
spells.flavor: Caught in the light. Every facet a witness.

spells.name: Feedback Loop
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Deal damage equal to 50% of the creature's ATK to itself and all adjacent enemies.
spells.flavor: Your own strength, redirected. The lattice does not create — it reflects.

spells.name: Data Mine
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Reveal all enemy creatures of the same type on the map for 45 seconds. Gain +2 mana.
spells.flavor: One intrusion is all the network needs.

spells.name: Static Field
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: All enemy creatures within 2 tiles take 400 damage and are slowed (Movement -1) for 20 seconds.
spells.flavor: The air remembers the trespass.

spells.name: Temporal Snare
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Creature is frozen (invulnerable but cannot act) for 25 seconds. When it unfreezes, it takes 600 damage.
spells.flavor: A moment stretched into an eternity. And then — the snap.

spells.name: Carnivorous Pit
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Deal 800 damage and root (Movement = 0) for 25 seconds.
spells.flavor: The ground opens. The Abyss is always hungry.

spells.name: Spore Bloom
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: All enemy creatures within 2 tiles are poisoned (-200 ATK/DEF, 100 damage per 10 seconds) for 45 seconds.
spells.flavor: Breathe. The spores were waiting for you.

spells.name: Entangling Roots
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Root enemy for 20 seconds. Summon a Lv.1 Korvess creature at the nearest friendly base.
spells.flavor: The Abyss takes one prisoner. The garden gains one soldier.

spells.name: Toxic Bloom
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Deal 500 damage. If this kills, all enemies within 2 tiles are poisoned for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: Death is just the first spore.

spells.name: Overgrowth Trap
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Waypoint becomes overgrown. Enemies cannot use it for 60 seconds and take 150 damage if they end turn on it.
spells.flavor: The path closes behind you. The Abyss reclaims what was borrowed.

spells.name: Magma Trap
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Deal 900 fire damage. The area burns for 30 seconds (50 damage per 10 seconds to enemies who remain).
spells.flavor: The Veil runs just beneath the surface. Step wrong and it finds you.

spells.name: Spirit Ward
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Enemy takes 400 damage. The nearest friendly creature gains +300 ATK/DEF for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: The ancestors guard this ground. Your trespass feeds their children.

spells.name: Volcanic Mine
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: After a 10-second warning, deal 1200 damage to all creatures within 3 tiles.
spells.flavor: A rumble. A glow. And then — the Veil speaks.

spells.name: Rage Trap
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Enemy gains +600 ATK but must attack the nearest creature (ally or enemy) immediately. Loses -400 DEF for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: Fury is not a weapon. It is a leash.

spells.name: Pyre Mark
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Creature is marked for 45 seconds. If it dies while marked, all your creatures gain +400 ATK for 30 seconds.
spells.flavor: The flame remembers its target. Even ash has a name.

spells.name: Proximity Mine
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Deal 700 damage. Cannot be detected before triggering.
spells.flavor: The Nine do not leave doors unlocked. They leave calibrated responses.

spells.name: System Override
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Creature disabled for 15 seconds, then you take control of it for 10 seconds.
spells.flavor: Your hardware. Our firmware. Do the math.

spells.name: Orbital Marker
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Creature is marked. Next turn, an orbital strike deals 1000 damage to its current location.
spells.flavor: The False Moon is patient. It is also always watching.

spells.name: Data Corruption
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: Creature's ATK and DEF are randomly swapped or halved for 30 seconds. Cannot receive buffs.
spells.flavor: Garbage in. Chaos out.

spells.name: Kill Switch
spells.effect: Trigger: enemy lands on this waypoint/base. Effect: If the creature has been on the field 60+ seconds, destroy it instantly. Otherwise, deal 500 damage.
spells.flavor: Every system has an expiration. The Nine simply move the date.
